findings.description: AUDIT-001 complete: 5 discrepancies found between CLAUDE.md/workspace-sync.md and build.js OWNERSHIP. 4 git-owned files (data/predictions.json, docs/llms.txt, docs/sitemap.xml, docs/robots.txt) are in CLAUDE.md and workspace-sync OWNED_BY_GIT but NOT in build.js OWNERSHIP. This means build.js publish does not copy them git→workspace, so FUSE workspace copies can go stale. 1 append-only directory (monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/) is in CLAUDE.md but not in build.js or workspace-sync.
findings.evidence: build.js lines 43-99 vs CLAUDE.md lines 49-66 vs workspace-sync.md lines 56-75. grep -q predictions build.js returns empty. grep issue-proposals workspace-sync.md returns empty.

suggested_fix.rationale: Add missing git-owned files to OWNERSHIP. Also add docs/llms.txt, docs/sitemap.xml, docs/robots.txt, and monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/: append_only.

findings.description: monitor/analyst/expansion-tracker.json is multi-writer (analyst FUSE + decider git clone) but not documented as such in CLAUDE.md's Unclassified section. Same class as tracker.json — protected by scheduling discipline but not by OWNERSHIP rules.
findings.evidence: analyst-normal-analysis.md:120 writes from FUSE. decider-curmudgeon.md:97,151 writes from git clone. CLAUDE.md line 69 documents tracker.json as multi-writer but not expansion-tracker.

suggested_fix.rationale: Add expansion-tracker.json to the Unclassified paragraph alongside tracker.json.
